title: Card View - Connected Columns

posts.author: JacksonBarry (Jackson Barry)
posts.cookedHtml:
It looks the like the connected board column is not supported in the Card View, does anyone have a work-around?

Use Case:
I’d like to use a card view to assess job applicants’ info side by side, and I can’t see the POSITION they applied for since it’s a connected column from another board.

Thanks
